summary: Iteration 85 - Testing completed for: 1) Payroll multi-tenant isolation, 2) Purchase SearchableSelect fields, 3) Partial receipt flow, 4) E2E purchase regression. All 17 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified with SearchableSelect fields properly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: hr_payroll.py uses dynamic collection getters (_get_payroll_coll etc) for tenant isolation
VERIFIED: purchase.py receive_purchase_order handles partial receipts correctly - sets status to 'partial' when not all items received
VERIFIED: PurchaseEnterprise.jsx uses SearchableSelect for Supplier, Warehouse, PIC, and Payment Account fields
VERIFIED: PurchaseReceiving.jsx loads orders with status filter for submitted, ordered, partial, posted
VERIFIED: SearchableSelect component supports search, clear, and sublabel display
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 tasks verified: 1) Payroll multi-tenant isolation working via dynamic collection getters, 2) Purchase form uses SearchableSelect for all required fields (Supplier, Warehouse, PIC, Payment Account), 3) Partial receipt flow updates PO status to 'partial' and tracks received_qty per item, 4) E2E purchase regression passed.
